https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main

📁 ComfyUI\models\unet\gguf

(I am using the Q5_1 version)

Optional: 

Create a simple one-sentence prompt. Describe the image style and clothing, especially elements not fully visible in your input image.

If you are using a stylized character use something like: 

Make an image in this style of [an anime illustration of an elf].

nodes.title: PROMPT (One Sentence: Describe style, character, clothes...)
widgets_values:
Young Indian woman, early 20s, confident and dominant personality, sharp expressive eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, neat hair, modern urban look, looks decisive and in control

Rules: 
Never loose hair 
Never playful expression 
Always looks like she’s leading

A full-body anime illustration of the woman from the reference image, sitting casually on a wooden stool. She holds a steaming cutting chai tapri glass from the reference image in one hand. She is pointing with her other hand.
She has a happy, attentive expression and a slight smile, as if listening intently. The background is a flat, solid green screen (hex code #00FF00). standard, eye-level camera angle to capture her from head to toe.
